content: خِلاَل الأيَّام الأخيرة في تَطوُّرات كِبيرة في الشُّغل
translations: eng:through the last few days there were big developments at work

transcriptions.arabizi: chilael il'ayaem il'acheera fi tatawwiraat kibeera fiilshughl
